# Project Instructions

- This project is a production-style fruit sourcing and export website built with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Prisma, and PostgreSQL.
- Maintain mobile-first responsive design, SEO metadata, and accessible navigation across all routes.
- Use static demo content where needed, and keep placeholders clearly identified for future replacement.
- When editing, prefer reusable components and keep API routes simple and well-typed.
- Verify builds and linting before considering changes complete.
